plugins.prepareCmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
import re
from pathlib import Path
v = '${nextRelease.version}'
p = Path('gradle.properties')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if p.exists() else ''
if 'version=' in text:
    text = re.sub(r'^version=.*$', f'version={v}', text, flags=re.M)
else:
    text = (text + '\n' if text and not text.endswith('\n') else text) + f'version={v}\n'
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
print('gradle.properties updated to', v)
PY
